code: import React from'react';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const CheckoutItem=_ref=>{let{checkoutItem}=_ref;console.log("checkoutItem");console.log(checkoutItem);const imgSrc=checkoutItem.product.images[0];console.log(imgSrc);const cartTitle=checkoutItem.product.title;const quantity=checkoutItem.quantity;const price=checkoutItem.product.price;const totalPrice=checkoutItem.price*quantity;const discountedPrice=checkoutItem.product.price-checkoutItem.product.discountPercentage/10;const totalDiscountedPrice=discountedPrice*quantity;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"flex flex-col rounded-lg bg-white sm:flex-row border border-gray-200 shadow hover:bg-gray-100",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{className:"m-2 h-24 w-28 rounded-md border object-cover object-center",src:imgSrc,alt:""}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"flex w-full flex-col px-4 py-4",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"font-semibold",children:cartTitle}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{className:"text-lg font-semibold text-red-400",children:["$",/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{className:"m-1 line-through",children:[price," * ",quantity]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{className:"text-lg font-semibold  text-red-400",children:["$",/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"m-1 line-through",children:totalPrice.toFixed(2)})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{className:"text-lg font-semibold",children:["$",/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{className:"m-1",children:[discountedPrice," * ",quantity]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{className:"text-lg font-semibold",children:["$",/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"m-1",children:totalDiscountedPrice.toFixed(2)})]})]})]});};export default CheckoutItem;
